candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This row is the only operating D&A line clearly tied to the selected COGS bucket. However, the statement also shows 'Cost of Goods Sold - Balancing value' rows around it, indicating the amortization is a component used to build the reported 'Cost of Goods Sold' total rather than a separate same-level expense to add on top.

variables.notes: Do not add separately. The amortization appears embedded within the selected 'Cost of Goods Sold' total, so adding it would double count.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in Selling Expenses
candidates.why: This row is explicitly tied to one of the selected XSGA components, 'Selling expenses'. But the nearby 'Selling expenses - Balancing value' rows indicate it is a component within the reported selling-expense total, not a separate expense to add on top.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This row is explicitly tied to one of the selected XSGA components, 'Administrative expenses'. The surrounding balancing rows indicate it is included within the reported administrative-expense total rather than presented as an additional same-level expense.

variables.notes: Do not add separately. Both SG&A-related amortization rows appear to be sub-components already embedded in the selected 'Selling expenses' and 'Administrative expenses' totals. No separate above-EBIT R&D amortization row is present in the excerpt.
